text: Instant News Alerts WHO declares global health emergency over Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda with over 300 suspected cases and 88 deaths. (AP) tweet
text_zh: 即时新闻快讯：世界卫生组织宣布刚果和乌干达的埃博拉疫情为全球卫生紧急状态，目前已有超过300例疑似病例和88例死亡。（美联社）推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: World Health Organization has declared a global health emergency over Ebola outbreaks in Congo and Uganda tweet
text_zh: 旁观者指数：突发：世界卫生组织已宣布刚果和乌干达的埃博拉疫情为全球卫生紧急状态。推文

text: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 BIG | Throughout the night and into the morning, Ukrainian UAVs broke into the Moscow region and inflicted fire damage on enemy targets. It has been precisely confirmed that the "Solnechnogorskaya" oil pumping station in Durikino (1-2) and the sanctioned microelectronics production enterprise "Angstrem" in Zelenograd (3) were hit. Regarding the damage to other targets, clarification is needed. During the entire night, it was reported that 131 UAVs were shot down in the sky over the Moscow region. Three Russians were killed and another 16 were injured. A significant number of the injured, according to Sobyanin, are workers of the Moscow refinery in Kapotnya, where an explosion occurred. The refinery itself was reportedly not damaged. Other photo and video materials show the consequences for ordinary civilians of the war unleashed by Putin in Ukraine. The total announced number of UAVs shot down by the enemy during the night is 556 units. tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ ‼️ 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 重大 | 整晚至清晨，乌克兰无人机突入莫斯科地区，对敌方目标造成了火灾破坏。现已确切证实，位于杜里基诺（Durikino）的“索尔涅奇诺戈尔斯克”（Solnechnogorskaya）输油站（1-2）以及位于泽列诺格勒（Zelenograd）受制裁的微电子生产企业“Angstrem”（3）遭到袭击。关于其他目标的受损情况，尚需进一步核实。据报道，整晚共有131架无人机在莫斯科地区上空被击落。三名俄罗斯人死亡，另有16人受伤。据索比亚宁称，伤者中很大一部分是卡波特尼亚（Kapotnya）莫斯科炼油厂的工人，该厂发生了爆炸。据报道，炼油厂本身并未受损。其他照片和视频资料展示了普京在乌克兰发动的战争对普通平民造成的影响。据敌方宣布，整晚被击落的无人机总数为556架。推文

text: Open Source Intel The World Health Organization (WHO) declared an international health emergency over a rare strain of Ebola that killed dozens in the Democratic Republic of Congo but stopped short of calling the outbreak a pandemic. "WHO...is hereby determining that the Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda constitutes a public health emergency of international concern (PHEIC), but does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 世界卫生组织（WHO）宣布刚果民主共和国爆发的一种罕见埃博拉病毒株为国际卫生紧急事件，但未将其定性为大流行病。“世卫组织……特此认定，刚果民主共和国和乌干达由本迪布焦病毒（Bundibugyo virus）引起的埃博拉疾病构成国际关注的突发公共卫生事件（PHEIC），但不符合大流行紧急情况的标准。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "Congratulations to Congresswoman Julia Letlow on a fantastic race, beating an Incumbent Senator by Record Setting Numbers. This is the first time in History that a sitting Senator has lost by such large numbers in a Primary, unable to even go forward. Julia Letlow is a fantastic person and, after taking care of some additional business, will make a brilliant Senator for the Great People of Louisiana, a State that I love, helped make prosperous with my Energy Policies and everything else, and won six times in a row, including Primaries. Julia Letlow is a spectacular person, and will never let you down! President DONALD J. TRUMP." DDHQ projects that U.S. Senator Bill Cassidy (R-LA) will fail to advance in Louisiana’s GOP Senate primary, with Rep. Julia Letlow and John Fleming heading to a runoff. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2055838287273562544/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“祝贺朱莉娅·莱特洛（Julia Letlow）众议员取得了一场精彩的竞选胜利，以创纪录的票数击败了一位现任参议员。这是历史上首次有在任参议员在初选中以如此大的差距落败，甚至无法进入下一轮。朱莉娅·莱特洛是一位了不起的人，在处理完一些额外事务后，她将成为路易斯安那州伟大人民的一位杰出参议员。我热爱这个州，通过我的能源政策和其他一切措施帮助它实现了繁荣，并且包括初选在内，我在这里连续赢得了六次胜利。朱莉娅·莱特洛是一个出色的人，她永远不会让你们失望！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” DDHQ预测，美国参议员比尔·卡西迪（Bill Cassidy，共和党，路易斯安那州）将无法在路易斯安那州的共和党参议院初选中胜出，朱莉娅·莱特洛众议员和约翰·弗莱明（John Fleming）将进入决选。由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2055838287273562544/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

text: WarMonitor We’re told the U.S. is in an AI race with China, while at the same time holding back arms for Taiwan, the place that actually makes the advanced chips powering our own AI, and the same place China wants to invade. Make it make sense. tweet
text_zh: 战争观察员 我们被告知美国正在与中国进行人工智能竞赛，但与此同时却扣留了对台湾的武器供应，而台湾正是生产驱动我们自身人工智能的高级芯片的地方，也是中国想要入侵的地方。这根本说不通。 推文

text_zh: 乌克兰发动无人机袭击，目标是俄罗斯的石油基础设施。

text: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 What is known about the UAV attack on Moscow and the Moscow region: ➡️ A woman died as a result of a UAV hitting a private house in Khimki, and another person is trapped under the rubble; ➡️ Two men died in the village of Pogorelki in Mytishchi as a result of UAV debris hitting a building under construction; ➡️ As a result of the drone attacks on Moscow, 12 people were injured; ➡️ A shift of builders at the Moscow Oil Refinery was affected, and three houses were also damaged; ➡️ Over the past 24 hours, more than 120 UAVs flying towards Moscow were shot down; ➡️ A house caught fire as a result of a UAV falling in the village of Subbotino in the Moscow region; ➡️ In Istra, near Moscow, a UAV damaged one apartment building and six private houses, and four victims are receiving medical assistance; ➡️ In the Putilkovo microdistrict in Krasnogorsk, a UAV hit an apartment building but no residents were injured. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 ⚔️ 🇺🇦 关于莫斯科及莫斯科州无人机袭击事件的已知情况：➡️ 一名妇女因无人机击中希姆基的一处私人住宅而死亡，另有一人被困在废墟下；➡️ 在梅季希的波戈列尔基村，两名男子因无人机残骸击中一处在建建筑而死亡；➡️ 莫斯科遭无人机袭击导致12人受伤；➡️ 莫斯科炼油厂的一班建筑工人受到波及，另有三栋房屋受损；➡️ 过去24小时内，飞往莫斯科的120多架无人机被击落；➡️ 莫斯科州苏博蒂诺村因无人机坠落导致一栋房屋起火；➡️ 在莫斯科附近的伊斯特拉，一架无人机损坏了一栋公寓楼和六栋私人住宅，四名受害者正在接受医疗救助；➡️ 在克拉斯诺戈尔斯克的普季尔科沃微区，一架无人机击中了一栋公寓楼，但没有居民受伤。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Ukrainian drone attacks reportedly targeted Moscow’s Sheremetyevo International Airport.
text_zh: 据报道，乌克兰无人机袭击的目标是莫斯科谢列梅捷沃国际机场。

text: The Trump administration allowed a sanctions waiver on Russian seaborne oil to expire Saturday, ending temporary permission for countries like India to keep buying Russian crude.
text_zh: 特朗普政府周六允许针对俄罗斯海运石油的制裁豁免到期，结束了印度等国继续购买俄罗斯原油的临时许可。

text: Venezuelan official Alex Saab, a close ally of Nicolás Maduro, was deported to the U.S., Venezuela’s migration agency said Saturday. Saab was arrested in Caracas in February during a joint U.S.-Venezuelan operation, shortly after Maduro’s own capture by U.S. forces. Saab, a Colombian-born businessman, had previously faced U.S. bribery charges after his 2020 arrest in Cape Verde. He was pardoned in 2023 in exchange for the release of detained Americans in Venezuela. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 委内瑞拉移民局周六表示，尼古拉斯·马杜罗的亲密盟友、委内瑞拉官员亚历克斯·萨博已被驱逐出境至美国。萨博于2月在加拉加斯的一次美委联合行动中被捕，此前不久马杜罗本人也被美军抓获。萨博是一位哥伦比亚裔商人，此前在2020年于佛得角被捕后曾面临美国的贿赂指控。他于2023年获得赦免，以换取委内瑞拉释放被拘留的美国人。来源：路透社

text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“比尔·卡西迪在政治生涯中虚假地利用了与我的‘关系’并因此赢得了选举，随后却投票弹劾我，指控荒谬至极，当时是假的，现在更是丧心病狂！他对将他选上台的人的不忠已成为传奇，很高兴看到他的政治生涯结束了！我要感谢路易斯安那州的伟大人民，这场伟大的胜利只会让我更加努力地为你们的成功以及随之而来的一切而工作。我爱你们所有人。让美国再次伟大！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” DDHQ 预测美国参议员比尔·卡西迪（共和党，路易斯安那州）将无法在路易斯安那州共和党参议院初选中晋级，朱莉娅·莱特洛（Julia Letlow）众议员和约翰·弗莱明（John Fleming）将进入决选。由 @AZ_Intel_ 贡献。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2055838287273562544/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Trump threatened to back a primary challenger against Rep. Lauren Boebert after she campaigned for Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky. Boebert, usually a strong Trump ally, supported Massie despite Trump’s push to unseat him. Trump called Boebert “weak minded” on Truth Social and invited challengers to run against her in Colorado’s 4th District.
text_zh: 在劳伦·博伯特（Lauren Boebert）众议员为肯塔基州的托马斯·马西（Thomas Massie）众议员助选后，特朗普威胁要支持一名初选挑战者来对抗她。博伯特通常是特朗普的坚定盟友，但尽管特朗普极力想要罢免马西，她还是支持了他。特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上称博伯特“意志薄弱”，并邀请挑战者在科罗拉多州第4选区与她竞争。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Reuters : U.S. President Donald Trump’s White House ballroom has had security funding removed by a Senate parliamentarian, jeopardizing Republican efforts to include it in a major spending package. Republicans say the funding is for security upgrades while Democrats criticize the project as costly and unnecessary. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 路透社：美国总统唐纳德·特朗普白宫宴会厅的安保资金已被参议院议事程序官取消，这危及了共和党将其纳入一项重大支出计划的努力。共和党人称这笔资金用于安保升级，而民主党人则批评该项目昂贵且不必要。@wfwitness

text: Bulgaria won the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna with Dara’s song “Bangaranga,” beating Israel and Romania in the final.
text_zh: 保加利亚凭借达拉（Dara）的歌曲《Bangaranga》在维也纳举行的2026年欧洲歌唱大赛中夺冠，在决赛中击败了以色列和罗马尼亚。

text: The EU is set to approve the terms of its €90B Ukraine loan next week, clearing the way for a first €9B payout in June. The money would fund €5.9B in drones and €3.2B in budget support, including soldiers’ salaries. The loan, agreed in December, is backed by joint EU debt after plans to use frozen Russian assets stalled. Half the funds will be distributed in 2026, with the rest in 2027. Ukraine still faces a €135B budget gap, and EU officials warn more support may be needed if the war continues into next year. Source: POLITICO
text_zh: 欧盟预计将于下周批准其900亿欧元的乌克兰贷款条款，为6月份首笔90亿欧元的支付扫清障碍。这笔资金将用于资助59亿欧元的无人机采购和32亿欧元的预算支持，其中包括士兵的工资。该贷款于12月达成一致，在利用被冻结的俄罗斯资产的计划陷入停滞后，由欧盟联合债务提供支持。一半资金将于2026年发放，其余部分于2027年发放。乌克兰仍面临1350亿欧元的预算缺口，欧盟官员警告称，如果战争持续到明年，可能需要更多的支持。来源：POLITICO

text: Canada is strengthening Arctic defense ties with Nordic countries as trust in the U.S. weakens under Trump’s threats to seize Greenland and annex Canada. Ottawa is expanding military cooperation with Denmark, Finland, Norway, Sweden, and Iceland while helping Greenland develop a local ranger force modeled on Canada’s Arctic Rangers. Prime Minister Mark Carney says Canada still values its NORAD partnership with the U.S. but wants stronger alliances among “middle powers.” Source: Reuters
text_zh: 由于特朗普威胁要夺取格陵兰岛并吞并加拿大，导致对美国的信任减弱，加拿大正在加强与北欧国家的北极防务联系。渥太华正在扩大与丹麦、芬兰、挪威、瑞典和冰岛的军事合作，同时帮助格陵兰岛建立一支仿照加拿大北极游骑兵（Arctic Rangers）模式的当地游骑兵部队。总理马克·卡尼（Mark Carney）表示，加拿大仍然重视与美国的北美防空司令部（NORAD）伙伴关系，但希望在“中等强国”之间建立更强大的联盟。来源：路透社

text: WarMonitor WHO has declared an international health emergency over a rare Ebola strain spreading in the Democratic Republic of Congo that has already killed dozens. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 世界卫生组织已宣布刚果民主共和国境内一种罕见的埃博拉病毒株正在蔓延，该病毒已导致数十人死亡，构成国际突发公共卫生事件。推文

text: WarMonitor It's almost as if it wasn't going to be paid for by donors after all. Tough break for the Trump Ballroom Senate Parliamentarian rules the $1 billion project will require 60 votes for approval, per Senate Budget Cmte Democrats Very very steep climb https://twitter.com/MacFarlaneNews/status/2055827556230709696/photo/1 - Scott MacFarlane tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 看来它终究还是不会由捐赠者买单。这对特朗普宴会厅来说是个沉重的打击。参议院议事规则专家裁定，该10亿美元的项目需要60票才能获得批准，据参议院预算委员会民主党人称，这非常非常困难 https://twitter.com/MacFarlaneNews/status/2055827556230709696/photo/1 - Scott MacFarlane 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 Secretary-general of the United Nations António Guterres: On the International Day Against Homophobia, Biphobia & Transphobia, we affirm a simple truth: Being who you are should never be a crime. The UN is proud to stand with all members of the human family, without discrimination of any kind. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 联合国秘书长安东尼奥·古特雷斯：在国际不再恐同、恐双、恐跨日，我们重申一个简单的真理：做你自己绝不应成为一种罪行。联合国很自豪能与人类大家庭的所有成员站在一起，不分任何形式的歧视。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇴 Reuters : Two campaign workers for Colombian presidential candidate Abelardo De La Espriella were shot dead in Meta province after four armed men on motorcycles intercepted them while they were transporting campaign materials. The killings come two weeks before Colombia’s presidential election, with De La Espriella blaming a dissident former FARC faction for the attack. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇴 路透社：哥伦比亚总统候选人阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里利亚（Abelardo De La Espriella）的两名竞选工作人员在梅塔省被枪杀，当时四名骑摩托车的武装人员在他们运送竞选材料时拦截了他们。此次杀戮发生在哥伦比亚总统大选前两周，德拉埃斯普里利亚指责一个持不同政见的哥伦比亚革命武装力量（FARC）派系发动了此次袭击。@wfwitness

text: 🇻🇪 🇺🇸 An ally of Nicolas Maduro Alex Saab was deported from Venezuela to the United States, Venezuelan Minister of Information and Communication Miguel Pérez announced. Pérez claims that Saab "was involved in various crimes in the United States," which was the reason for the deportation. From October 2024 to January 2026, Saab served as the Minister of Industry and National Production of Venezuela. On March 14, it was reported that the Venezuelan government was negotiating the transfer of the ex-minister to the United States. American prosecutors consider him a central figure in "Maduro's criminal schemes". On June 12, 2020, at the request of the United States, Saab was detained in Cape Verde. In October 2021, he was extradited to the United States, where he was accused of laundering $350 million in American banks. In December 2023, he was released as part of a prisoner exchange agreement between the United States and Venezuela and returned to Caracas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇻🇪 🇺🇸 委内瑞拉新闻和通信部长米格尔·佩雷斯宣布，尼古拉斯·马杜罗的盟友亚历克斯·萨博已从委内瑞拉被驱逐出境至美国。佩雷斯声称，萨博“在美国涉及多项罪行”，这就是他被驱逐的原因。2024年10月至2026年1月，萨博曾担任委内瑞拉工业和国家生产部长。3月14日有报道称，委内瑞拉政府正在就将这位前部长移交给美国进行谈判。美国检察官认为他是“马杜罗犯罪计划”的核心人物。2020年6月12日，应美国要求，萨博在佛得角被拘留。2021年10月，他被引渡至美国，被指控在美国银行洗钱3.5亿美元。2023年12月，作为美国与委内瑞拉囚犯交换协议的一部分，他获释并返回加拉加斯。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 🤡Trump is on the most schizo Truth Social bender to date - ranging from posting photos from Beijing trip to rambling about Lincoln Reflecting pool to reposting Laura Loomer's ramblings about senator Massie - while openly announcing imminent strikes on Iran.…" 🇺🇸 While Trump tries to undermine Massie, his former supporter Marjorie Taylor Greene shows support 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 🤡特朗普正在进行迄今为止最精神分裂的 Truth Social 发帖狂潮——从发布北京之行的照片，到喋喋不休地谈论林肯纪念堂倒影池，再到转发劳拉·卢默关于马西参议员的胡言乱语——同时公开宣布即将对伊朗进行打击……” 🇺🇸 特朗普试图削弱马西的同时，他曾经的支持者玛乔丽·泰勒·格林却表示了支持 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: OSINTtechnical 今天上午，乌克兰对俄罗斯首都莫斯科发动了大规模无人机袭击。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2055822061860454896/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor I have 100k followers here and only around 25k on Bluesky, yet I’m still getting more views over there. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我在这里有10万粉丝，而在Bluesky上只有大约2.5万，但我那边的浏览量反而更高。 推文

text: 🇺🇦 Videos from Gaisin, Vinnitsa region are going viral in Ukraine: the population is only 23 thousand, and this is the alley that's dedicated to the locals who died at the front. People call it "a catastrophe" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 来自文尼察州盖辛的视频在乌克兰疯传：该地人口仅2.3万，这是专门为在阵亡的当地人设立的纪念巷。人们称之为“一场灾难” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇸🇦 🇧🇭 🇰🇼 The UK has deployed its new low cost APKWS anti drone missile system on RAF Typhoon fighter jets in the Middle East to help defend British forces and Gulf allies from drone attacks. British officials said the system was tested and deployed in under two months and is designed to counter drones at a fraction of the cost of traditional air to air missiles. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇸🇦 🇧🇭 🇰🇼 英国已在中东地区的英国皇家空军台风战斗机上部署了其新型低成本APKWS反无人机导弹系统，以帮助保护英军和海湾盟友免受无人机袭击。英国官员表示，该系统在不到两个月的时间内就完成了测试和部署，旨在以传统空对空导弹的一小部分成本来对抗无人机。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇨🇩 At least 80 people have died in a new Ebola outbreak in eastern DR Congo’s Ituri province, according to the country’s health ministry. Officials say the outbreak involves the Bundibugyo strain of the virus, with 246 suspected cases reported so far, including…" ⚡️ 🇨🇩 🇺🇬 The World Health Organization has declared the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern over the spread of the Bundibugyo strain. The WHO said the outbreak does not currently meet the criteria for a pandemic emergency. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇨🇩 据刚果民主共和国卫生部称，该国东部伊图里省爆发的新一轮埃博拉疫情已造成至少 80 人死亡。官员表示，此次疫情涉及该病毒的本迪布焦（Bundibugyo）毒株，目前已报告 246 例疑似病例，其中包括……” ⚡️ 🇨🇩 🇺🇬 世界卫生组织已宣布刚果民主共和国和乌干达的埃博拉疫情因本迪布焦毒株的传播而构成国际关注的突发公共卫生事件。世卫组织表示，此次疫情目前尚未达到大流行紧急状态的标准。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Venezuela says it has deported Nicolás Maduro ally Alex Saab amid ongoing criminal investigations in the United States. "The Government of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela announces the deportation of Colombian citizen Alex Naim Saab Morán, carried out on May 16, 2026, in compliance with the provisions of Venezuelan immigration law. The deportation measure was adopted considering that the aforementioned Colombian citizen is allegedly involved in the commission of various crimes in the United States of America, as is publicly known and widely reported in the media." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Venezuela 表示，在持续进行的美国刑事调查中，它已驱逐了尼古拉斯·马杜罗的盟友亚历克斯·萨博。“委内瑞拉玻利瓦尔共和国政府宣布，根据委内瑞拉移民法的规定，已于 2026 年 5 月 16 日执行了对哥伦比亚公民亚历克斯·纳伊姆·萨博·莫兰的驱逐。采取驱逐措施是考虑到上述哥伦比亚公民据称在美国境内涉嫌犯下多项罪行，正如公众所知且媒体广泛报道的那样。”推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: Is anyone interested in running against Weak Minded Lauren Boebert in Colorado's Fourth Congressional District? You remember Lauren moved to the District when it became obvious that she couldn't win in her original Congressional District (The Third!) - A Carpetbagger, indeed! Boebert is campaigning for the Worst "Republican" Congressman in the History of our Country, Thomas Massie, of the Great Commonwealth of Kentucky, and anybody who can be that dumb deserves a good Primary fight! Even though I long ago endorsed Boebert, if the right person came along, it would be my Honor to withdraw that Endorsement, and endorse a good and proper alternative. Just let me know, or announce your Candidacy, and I will be there for you! President DONALD J. TRUMP tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：有人有兴趣在科罗拉多州第四国会选区竞选，挑战头脑简单的劳伦·博伯特吗？你们记得劳伦搬到该选区是因为很明显她在她原来的国会选区（第三选区！）赢不了——她确实是个外来政客！博伯特正在为我们国家历史上最糟糕的“共和党”国会议员、来自伟大的肯塔基州的托马斯·马西竞选，任何能蠢到这种地步的人都值得一场好的初选挑战！尽管我很久以前就支持了博伯特，但如果合适的人选出现，我很荣幸撤回该支持，并支持一位优秀且合适的替代者。只要让我知道，或者宣布你的候选资格，我就会支持你！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT WarTranslated RT @AndrewPerpetua : We are fundraising to provide Khartiia with critical transport vans. Logistics keeps the front moving. Please support the mission below. You can donate here: https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN Vehicles are a commodity. We've tracked vehicle losses in Ukraine for years, including light-skinned vehicles such as vans and pickup trucks. Those who follow us know and understand the attrition rates. The scale is immense. In the first 22 days of April alone, we tracked 931 losses in this category (cars, pickups, SUVs, and vans, combined). As our followers know, video analysis captures only a fraction of the total losses. While some of these vehicles are ultimately recovered and repaired, many are abandoned, stripped for parts, or destroyed. This is the reality of war. Support for Ukraine means funding and supplying these vehicles. Why Vans? Cargo In → Casualties Out Inbound: Vans protect sensitive cargo, such as electronics, from dust, mud, and rain. Outbound: Once goods are delivered, these vehicles provide a protected, enclosed space to evacuate the wounded for treatment. The Goal: $100,000 We are raising funds to purchase, repair, and prep vans for Khartiia and another secret special unit. The budget covers the purchase price, mud tires, spare parts, and technical preparation required for front-line deployment. This is the first fundraiser spearheaded by my data collection and mapping project, Ukraine Daily Update, in association with volunteers at Tochnyi. To ensure total transparency and professional logistics, we are partnering with Liberty Ukraine, which will handle the backend and 501(c)(3) status. We know our audience understands the scale of this need. We hope those who are able will donate to help us get these vans to the front as promptly as possible. The fundraiser page is here, with alternative ways to donate: https://www.libertyukraine.org/from-screens-to-the-frontline tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT WarTranslated RT @AndrewPerpetua：我们正在筹款为 Khartiia 提供关键的运输货车。后勤保障是前线推进的关键。请支持以下任务。你可以在这里捐款：https://www.paypal.com/donate?campaign_id=RJR9RTMJSAULN 车辆是必需品。多年来，我们一直在追踪乌克兰的车辆损失，包括轻型车辆，如货车和皮卡车。关注我们的人都知道并了解损耗率。规模是巨大的。仅在四月的前22天，我们就追踪到了该类别（汽车、皮卡、SUV和货车的总和）931辆的损失。正如我们的关注者所知，视频分析只能捕捉到总损失的一小部分。虽然其中一些车辆最终被找回并修复，但许多被遗弃、拆解零件或被摧毁。这就是战争的现实。支持乌克兰意味着资助和提供这些车辆。为什么是货车？货物进入 → 伤员撤出 进入：货车保护敏感货物（如电子设备）免受灰尘、泥土和雨水的侵害。撤出：货物送达后，这些车辆提供了一个受保护的封闭空间，用于撤离伤员进行治疗。目标：100,000美元 我们正在筹集资金，为 Khartiia 和另一个秘密特种部队购买、修理和准备货车。预算涵盖了购买价格、泥地轮胎、备件以及前线部署所需的技术准备。这是我的数据收集和绘图项目“乌克兰每日更新”与 Tochnyi 的志愿者合作发起的第一次筹款活动。为了确保完全透明和专业的后勤，我们正在与 Liberty Ukraine 合作，他们将处理后台和 501(c)(3) 身份。我们知道我们的受众了解这一需求的规模。我们希望有能力的人能够捐款，帮助我们尽快将这些货车送到前线。筹款页面在这里，还有其他捐款方式：https://www.libertyukraine.org/from-screens-to-the-frontline 推文

text: Open Source Intel There is a possibility that this week could be a very interesting one. USAF C-17 transport aircraft continue to follow a familiar pattern seen in the lead-up to February 28, when the Iran war began, shuttling between Europe and the Middle East. - Image via FR https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2055790929013796968/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 本周可能会非常有趣。美国空军的 C-17 运输机继续遵循在 2月28日伊朗战争开始前夕所见的熟悉模式，在欧洲和中东之间穿梭。 - 图片来自 FR https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2055790929013796968/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix You lot predicted 13 days to collapse a month ago….. The reality inside the Iranian regime is now what @FDD @miadmaleki predicted it would be. He follows the facts — and they are increasingly brutal for the regime. - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 你们这群人一个月前预测还有13天就会崩溃……伊朗政权内部的现实现在正如 @FDD @miadmaleki 所预测的那样。他遵循事实——而这些事实对该政权来说正变得越来越残酷。 - 马克·杜博维茨 推文
